# Generic catch-all RTSP paths used by many cheap or unbranded cameras,
# plus path templates extracted from nmap's rtsp-url-brute script.
/stream1	Generic stream1
/stream2	Generic stream2
/live	Generic live
/live0	Generic live0
/live1	Generic live1
/main	Generic main
/sub	Generic sub
/mainstream	Generic mainstream
/substream	Generic substream
/profile1	Generic profile1
/profile2	Generic profile2
/videoSub	Generic videoSub
/ch0_0.h264	Generic ch0_0.h264
/ch0_1.h264	Generic ch0_1.h264

# Numeric NVR channels.
/0	Generic 0
/0/video1	Generic 0/video1
/1	Generic 1
/1/1:1/main	Generic 1/1:1/main
/1/cif	Generic 1/cif
/1/stream1	Generic 1/stream1
/11	Generic 11
/12	Generic 12
/4	Generic 4

# Short ch / cam variants.
/ch0	Generic ch0
/ch0.h264	Generic ch0.h264
/cam	Generic cam
/cam0_0	Generic cam0_0
/cam0_1	Generic cam0_1

# Indexed audio/video pseudo-channels.
/av0_0	Generic av0_0
/av0_1	Generic av0_1
/av2	Generic av2
/avn=2	Generic avn=2
/tcp/av0_0	Generic tcp/av0_0

# Live family (cheap-camera firmwares).
/livestream	Generic livestream
/livestream/	Generic livestream/
/live/av0	Generic live/av0
/live/ch0	Generic live/ch0
/live/ch00_0	Generic live/ch00_0
/live/ch00_1	Generic live/ch00_1
/live/ch1	Generic live/ch1
/live/ch2	Generic live/ch2
/live/h264	Generic live/h264
/live/mpeg4	Generic live/mpeg4
/live0.264	Generic live0.264
/live1.264	Generic live1.264

# Codec-tagged short paths.
/h264	Generic h264
/H264	Generic H264 (uppercase)
/h264.sdp	Generic h264.sdp
/h264_vga.sdp	Generic h264 VGA SDP
/mp4	Generic mp4
/mpeg4	Generic mpeg4
/rtsph264	Generic rtsph264
/rtsph2641080p	Generic rtsph264 1080p

# IPCAM SDP.
/ipcam.sdp	Generic ipcam.sdp
/ipcam_h264.sdp	Generic ipcam_h264.sdp

# ONVIF probes.
/ONVIF/MediaInput	Generic ONVIF MediaInput
/ONVIF/channel1	Generic ONVIF channel1
/onvif1	Generic onvif1
/onvif2	Generic onvif2
/channel1	Generic channel1

# Media / video generic endpoints.
/media	Generic media
/medias1	Generic medias1
/video	Generic video
/video.3gp	Generic video.3gp
/video.cgi	Generic video.cgi
/video.cgi?resolution=VGA	Generic video.cgi VGA
/video.cgi?resolution=vga	Generic video.cgi vga
/video.h264	Generic video.h264
/video.mp4	Generic video.mp4
/video2.mjpg	Generic video2.mjpg
/videostream.cgi?rate=0	Generic videostream.cgi rate=0
/camera.stm	Generic camera.stm

# Snapshot / MJPEG CGIs.
/GetData.cgi	Generic GetData.cgi
/image/jpeg.cgi	Generic image/jpeg.cgi
/image.mpg	Generic image.mpg
/jpg/image.jpg?size=3	Generic jpg snapshot
/mjpeg.cgi	Generic mjpeg.cgi
/streaming/mjpeg	Generic streaming/mjpeg
/ioImage/1	Generic ioImage/1

# Multicast / unicast variants.
/multicaststream	Generic multicaststream
/ucast/11	Generic ucast/11
/unicast/c1/s1/live	Generic unicast c1 s1 live

# Misc weak labels.
/wfov	Generic wfov
/vis	Generic vis

# XMEye / Sricam style URL with credentials baked in.
/user=admin_password=tlJwpbo6_channel=1_stream=0.sdp?real_stream	XMEye baked-in creds

# Templates / placeholders extracted from nmap rtsp-url-brute.
# These are not real paths on most cameras but kept here on purpose so
# we still probe them as a sanity check.
/Possible	Nmap placeholder Possible
/access_code	Nmap placeholder access_code
/access_name_for_stream_1_to_5	Nmap placeholder access_name
/user_defined	Nmap placeholder user_defined
/recognizer	Nmap placeholder recognizer
/synthesizer	Nmap placeholder synthesizer
